animation.css_keyframes: @keyframes fly_plum { 0% { transform: translate(-20vw, 30vh) rotate(5deg); } 15% { transform: translate(10vw, 15vh) rotate(15deg); } 30% { transform: translate(30vw, 45vh) rotate(-10deg); } 50% { transform: translate(50vw, 20vh) rotate(8deg); } 70% { transform: translate(70vw, 50vh) rotate(-12deg); } 85% { transform: translate(90vw, 25vh) rotate(10deg); } 100% { transform: translate(120vw, 35vh) rotate(0deg); } }

@keyframes fly_yawn { 0% { transform: translate(-20vw, 30vh) rotate(-15deg); } 20% { transform: translate(10vw, 15vh) rotate(5deg); } 40% { transform: translate(40vw, 40vh) rotate(-20deg); } 60% { transform: translate(65vw, 10vh) rotate(10deg); } 80% { transform: translate(90vw, 35vh) rotate(-10deg); } 100% { transform: translate(120vw, 20vh) rotate(5deg); } }

@keyframes fly_milo { 0% { transform: translate(-20vw, 40vh) rotate(-5deg); } 15% { transform: translate(5vw, 15vh) rotate(8deg); } 30% { transform: translate(30vw, 55vh) rotate(-10deg); } 50% { transform: translate(60vw, 10vh) rotate(12deg); } 70% { transform: translate(90vw, 50vh) rotate(-15deg); } 100% { transform: translate(120vw, 35vh) rotate(5deg); } }
